subject: physics
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.24
question_html:
The mass of nuclear fuel in a nuclear reactor decreases at the rate of 8 mg every hour. The overall reaction process has an efficiency of 50 %. What is the maximum power output of the reactor?

A.  100 MW

B.  200 MW

C.  100 GW

D.  200 GW
examiners_html: The discrimination index was below the desired 0.2 with a high number of blank responses and many candidates choosing each of the options. This is a question requiring consideration of units using 10-6 for mg to kg and also remembering to allow for efficiency.
